name: Pasta Con Broccole
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Hot pepper flakes, if you wish
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped garlic and hot pepper flakes.
2. Sauté until the garlic turns golden brown.
3. Stir in the fresh basil, tomatoes, oregano, salt, and pepper.
4. Cover and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
5. While the sauce simmers, wash and trim the broccoli into bite-sized pieces.
6. Blanch the broccoli in boiling water for about 5 minutes until tender.
7. Add the blanched broccoli to the skillet and continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Cook the pasta al dente according to package instructions.
9. Serve hot, topped with grated cheese.
